docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2014 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BROWN, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT MERRIOUNS, ASHLEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BROWN, MICHAEL
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, MICHAEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MERRIOUNS, ASHLEY STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00) SERVED NOV-27-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MERRIOUNS, ASHLEY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-23-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-23-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
